0.text: 4 mm nodule in the laterobasal segment of the lower lobe of the left lung

1.text: 2-3 mm subpleural nodule in the anterobasal segment of the lower lobe of the right lung

2.text: Ground-glass opacities in the middle lobe of the right lung

3.text: Ground-glass opacities in the lower lobe of the left lung
